themes.label: Order Execution Issues
quotes: worst app, very high brokerage, and also very worst in order execution , I cancel my order before execution but still that order is executed, worst highly not recommended
exit all not working!!!! loss money sometimes

themes.label: Withdrawal Delays
quotes: overall grow app is good but it takes several hours to withdrawal
the most worst app I have used ever in my life a big withdrawal issue if I withdraw my money it comes back to my groww account instead of bank account groww needs to work on this issue

themes.label: App Performance and Bugs
quotes: Today the app crashed & I got 3600 loss because of crashed. Not working the app to sell when I was at profit.. after 2 hour sold the trade at 3600 loss because of grow. third class chart view. wrong information showing in chart. on expiry of nifty opposite direction showing from trading view. when you got loss then showing the perfect chart.

App is nice and user friendly but at some critical time to stop the loss or withdraw the profit it stops showing exit button due to this inconvenience it is feeling more than worst. why we will need the exit button after loosing all the money? Dear grow team I have faced this difficulty several time during intraday trading which is the worst ever experience. Please look into the matter and resolve the issue at the earliest to loose many users.

themes.label: Customer Support Issues
quotes: Rand Customer Service BKL Ko 10 min Tak Call karne ka try Kia Koi nahi uthaya uninstall kar raha

I have never seen a platform as bad as groww. Do not allow to delete the account. No need to call the help line, the music plays for hours. A useless platform. If there is a problem for some reason, the help line cannot be contacted. I request everyone to call the help line once before depositing money and check if I am right or not.

themes.label: External Mutual Fund Tracking Issues
quotes: 1 month ho gya abhi tak mutual fund ki payment received nahi hue
tracking external funds is currently paused. we will come back soon with the updated experience

action_ideas.title: Implement a Real-Time Order Execution Status Update Feature
action_ideas.rationale: To address order execution issues, as seen in theme_1, by providing users with instant updates on their order status to prevent unexpected executions.

action_ideas.title: Develop a Priority-Based Customer Support System for Time-Sensitive Trading Issues
action_ideas.rationale: To resolve customer support issues, as highlighted in theme_4, by offering a priority-based support system that quickly addresses time-sensitive trading problems.

action_ideas.title: Introduce a Redundancy Check for Withdrawal Transactions to Prevent Delays
action_ideas.rationale: To tackle withdrawal delays, as mentioned in theme_2, by implementing a redundancy check that ensures withdrawal transactions are processed correctly and promptly.
